[PDF_PAGE 26 | score=10] Requirements To qualify as an elf, a hero must have a minimum score of 6 in Agility, Dexter- ity, and Presence. In addition, elve have a maximum score of 8 in Strength and Endurance. Elves, as talented archers and skilled swordsmen, must have an ability code of "A" or “B” in both Strength and Dex- terity. Members of this race never wear exceptionally heavy armor, however, and they restrict themselves to lighter shields. Thus, no hero with an ability code higher than “C” in Endurance or Agility can be an elf. [PDF_PAGE 26 | score=1] Requirements To qualify as an elf, a hero must have a minimum score of 6 in Agility, Dexter- ity, and Presence. In addition, elve have a maximum score of 8 in Strength and Endurance. Elves, as talented archers and skilled swordsmen, must have an ability code of "A" or “B” in both Strength and Dex- terity.
